name: CyberSentinel AI
description: Imports findings from CyberSentinel AI (https://github.com/3sk1nt4n/cybersentinel-ai), an agentic, local AI-driven security platform that orchestrates 33 tools (Nmap, Nuclei, Nikto, SQLMap, Shodan, VirusTotal, ELK, Neo4j…) in a Kali sandbox and analyzes the results with a local LLM, mapping findings to MITRE ATT&CK. The scanned target host/URL becomes an ASSET; discovered services/open ports become components; each vulnerability/finding (CVE ref or title + severity) becomes a VULNERABILITY. Offline mode: parse a CyberSentinel results JSON export. Live mode: with `target` (+ `api_base`), POST a scan to the CyberSentinel FastAPI backend and import the returned results. Active/intrusive multi-tool scanning. No DB access in run.py (worker-safe).

parameters.name: file
parameters.help: Path on the worker to a CyberSentinel AI results JSON export to import (offline mode).

parameters.name: target
parameters.help: Live mode: host or URL for CyberSentinel to scan (must be in the engagement scope).

parameters.name: api_base
parameters.help: Live mode: base URL of the CyberSentinel AI FastAPI backend (default http://localhost:8000).

parameters.name: api_key
parameters.help: Live mode: API token/bearer for the CyberSentinel backend (if authentication is enabled).

parameters.name: scan_type
parameters.help: Live mode: scan profile requested from the CyberSentinel backend.
